# Acme

> Agent Content Tree for Acme.

## en-US

### Landing

- [About Acme](https://acme.example.com/en-US/landing/about): Founded to make agent-content interchange a default.
- [Contact](https://acme.example.com/en-US/landing/contact): Talk to sales, support, or community.
- [Data Processing Addendum](https://acme.example.com/en-US/landing/dpa): Acme's data-processing terms for enterprise customers.
- [Features](https://acme.example.com/en-US/landing/features): Everything you need to build with ACT.
- [Pricing](https://acme.example.com/en-US/landing/pricing): Simple, transparent pricing tiers and FAQ.
- [Privacy Policy](https://acme.example.com/en-US/landing/privacy): How Acme handles personal data.

## es-ES

### Landing

- [Sobre Acme](https://acme.example.com/es-ES/landing/about): Fundada para hacer del intercambio de contenidos de agentes una opción por defecto.
- [Contacto](https://acme.example.com/es-ES/landing/contact): Contacta con ventas, soporte o la comunidad.
- [Data Processing Addendum](https://acme.example.com/es-ES/landing/dpa): Acme's data-processing terms for enterprise customers.
- [Funciones](https://acme.example.com/es-ES/landing/features): Todo lo que necesitas para construir con ACT.
- [Precios](https://acme.example.com/es-ES/landing/pricing): Precios simples y transparentes.
- [Política de privacidad](https://acme.example.com/es-ES/landing/privacy): Cómo Acme maneja los datos personales.

## de-DE

### Landing

- [Über Acme](https://acme.example.com/de-DE/landing/about): Gegründet, um Agenten-Inhaltsaustausch zur Standardoption zu machen.
- [Kontakt](https://acme.example.com/de-DE/landing/contact): Sprechen Sie mit Vertrieb, Support oder Community.
- [Data Processing Addendum](https://acme.example.com/de-DE/landing/dpa): Acme's data-processing terms for enterprise customers.
- [Funktionen](https://acme.example.com/de-DE/landing/features): Alles, was Sie für ACT brauchen.
- [Preise](https://acme.example.com/de-DE/landing/pricing): Einfache, transparente Preise.
- [Datenschutzerklärung](https://acme.example.com/de-DE/landing/privacy): Wie Acme mit personenbezogenen Daten umgeht.

## ja-JP

### Landing

- [Acme について](https://acme.example.com/ja-JP/landing/about): エージェント・コンテンツ交換を標準にするために設立。
- [お問い合わせ](https://acme.example.com/ja-JP/landing/contact): 営業、サポート、コミュニティへのお問い合わせ。
- [Data Processing Addendum](https://acme.example.com/ja-JP/landing/dpa): Acme's data-processing terms for enterprise customers.
- [機能](https://acme.example.com/ja-JP/landing/features): ACT で構築するために必要なすべて。
- [料金](https://acme.example.com/ja-JP/landing/pricing): シンプルで透明性のある料金体系。
- [プライバシーポリシー](https://acme.example.com/ja-JP/landing/privacy): Acme が個人データを扱う方法。
